tool.name: Data Assembler
tool.description: Assembles data from reflectivity, parquet files, and analyzer model into a single AI-ready output.

param.name: parquet
param.label: Parquet files
param.help: Optional. When omitted, the -p flag is dropped from the data-assembler call.

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: A workflow-state JSON. Provides the reduced reflectivity, fitted model, and raw NeXus paths.

tool.command:
SHIM='$ndip_shim' && ## Per-run subdir (<output_directory>/<run>) keeps each run's assembled ## output unique; matches project-out's _sub(s, "assembled"). RUN_DIR=`python "\$SHIM" rundir '$config_json'` && ASSEMBLED_DIR="\$RUN_DIR/assembled" && mkdir -p "\$ASSEMBLED_DIR" &&
#if $parquet mkdir parquet && tar -xzvf $parquet -C parquet && #end if
echo "=== data-assembler ingest ===" | tee -a $output && INGEST_ARGS=`python "\$SHIM" project-out ingest '$config_json'` && eval data-assembler ingest \$INGEST_ARGS #if $parquet -p parquet #end if --result-out _ingest_result.json > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2); INGEST_RC=\$? && python "\$SHIM" merge-in ingest '$config_json' _ingest_result.json \$INGEST_RC _ingest_state.json && if [ "\$INGEST_RC" -ne 0 ]; then cp _ingest_state.json '$updated_config'; echo "data-assembler ingest failed (exit \$INGEST_RC)" | tee -a $output >&2; exit \$INGEST_RC; fi &&
echo "=== nr-isaac-format convert-ingest ===" | tee -a $output && CONVERT_ARGS=`python "\$SHIM" project-out convert _ingest_state.json` && eval nr-isaac-format convert-ingest \$CONVERT_ARGS --result-out _convert_result.json > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2); CONVERT_RC=\$? && python "\$SHIM" merge-in convert _ingest_state.json _convert_result.json \$CONVERT_RC '$updated_config' && if [ "\$CONVERT_RC" -ne 0 ]; then echo "nr-isaac-format convert-ingest failed (exit \$CONVERT_RC)" | tee -a $output >&2; exit \$CONVERT_RC; fi &&
## Drop the final workflow state alongside the assembled artifacts so the ## tarball is self-describing. cp '$updated_config' "\$ASSEMBLED_DIR/results.json" && tar -czvf $out_gz -C "\$ASSEMBLED_DIR" .
